root_causes.retrieval: RAG system failed to retrieve relevant context chunks for the query
root_causes.answer_quality: Generated answer was incorrect, incomplete, or hallucinated
root_causes.citations: Answer was not properly grounded in the retrieved context
root_causes.other: Other failure modes not categorized above

retrieval: Improve embedding model for better semantic matching
Tune chunk size and overlap parameters
Add metadata filtering for domain-specific retrieval
answer_quality: Fine-tune LLM on domain-specific Q&A pairs
Add answer validation against retrieved context
Add post-processing to verify factual accuracy
Use larger or more capable LLM for generation
citations: Use extractive QA for factual claims
Add penalties for unsupported claims in training
other: Review edge cases and add specific handling
Improve error handling and fallback mechanisms
